mapper.select: SELECT c.SERVICE_NO, u.USER_ID, u.USER_NM, c.CERT_DT, c.CERT_CD, d.COMPANY_NM, d.DEPARTMENT_NM, d.MANAGE_NM, d.ORIGIN_CD, c.CERT_COMMENT, c.REG_ID FROM TS_WORK_CERT c LEFT JOIN TC_USER u ON c.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TS_DEPT_STRUCTURE d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.ORIGIN_CD WHERE c.SERVICE_NO = #{serviceNo}
